data.name: Label2.Text
data.value:
Use the David's Currency Converter to calculate your exchange rates between GBP, EUR and USD currencies, from any where around the world. Simply input the amount, select the source and destination currencies, and view result. You can use this great programme for free. Happy converting! 🌐💱
For any problems or further information Contact: 20262153@farn-ct.ac.uk
